item.name: Magitek Conveyor Identification Key
item.description: A thin, rectangular piece of what appears to be cermet. Placing it near your magitek conveyor will magically bring the machine to life.

mount.name: Magitek Conveyor
mount.action: Call into battle your magitek conveyor, a modern-day improvement on ancient Allagan logistics.
mount.description: It is not in Garlean nature to leave well enough alone, and so for the past twenty summers, imperial magitek engineers have been perfecting the art of aerial transport. Surprisingly, it is not outfitted with an active weapons system─clearly an oversight that will be amended in the next model.
mount.tooltip:
I cannot begin to comprehend
what our visitor is trying to
convey.
- OIC Administrator
